metadata.task_title: Compress a JPG to a smaller size
metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 90.jpg in Documents > Task 90 folder on Photos app. Reduce the image size to 40%
metadata.context: I have a picture but is too large to share as an email attachment. I need a smaller JPEG.

l3.rationale: Win key starts the shortcut flow to open the Run dialog.

l4.rationale: Used Run/File Explorer keyboard navigation to reach Documents > Task 90 and open Task ID 90.jpg in Photos.

l5.rationale: Covers launching Photos, navigating to Documents > Task 90, and opening Task ID 90.jpg.

l3.rationale: Tab moves focus from the image pane to the Edit button.
